task_completion.description: Verify that the 4 specified bookmark folders are created and personal bookmarks are deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for folders named 'OEM Portals', 'Parts Suppliers', 'Diagnostic Tools', and 'Shop Management' in the browser's bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager. Personal bookmarks (e.g., netflix, facebook, espn, reddit, steampowered, twitter) should not be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that popup exceptions are added for the specified domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Site Settings > Pop-ups and redirects page. The 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' list should include motorcraftservice.com, acdelcotds.com, and techauthority.com.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom search engine with keyword 'vin' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Manage search engines and site search page. There should be an entry with the keyword 'vin' and the URL 'https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/decoder/Decoder/Submit/VIN?VIN=%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default Page Zoom is set to 125%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Appearance settings page. The 'Page zoom' dropdown should be set to '125%'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download directory is set to ~/Documents/TSB_Wiring_Diagrams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Downloads settings page. The 'Location' path should end with 'Documents/TSB_Wiring_Diagrams'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggle is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Downloads settings page. The toggle switch for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' should be in the off/disabled position.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the browser's graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser window, settings menus, and bookmark manager being actively used, rather than terminal commands modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just open a text editor to type out the expected settings to fool the verifier.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings must be visible within the actual browser UI, not in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshots show actual browser settings pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard browser UI elements like the address bar showing 'chrome://settings/...', sidebars, and standard toggle switches.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bookmark folders to create: 'OEM Portals', 'Parts Suppliers', 'Diagnostic Tools', 'Shop Management'. Personal domains to delete: netflix.com, facebook.com, espn.com, reddit.com, steampowered.com, twitter.com. Popup exceptions to add: motorcraftservice.com, acdelcotds.com, techauthority.com. Custom search engine keyword: 'vin', URL: 'https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/decoder/Decoder/Submit/VIN?VIN=%s'. Download directory must end with 'TSB_Wiring_Diagrams'.
